cindys-doggie-parlour-cape-town.author: Jacques Wainwright
cindys-doggie-parlour-cape-town.text:
I just took my 14-year-old Golden Retriever, Cody, to Cindy’s Doggy Parlour, and WOW! I am blown away. Cindy accomplished what no groomer has been able to achieve in the past five years. Cody looks (and clearly feels) like a brand-new “man.” The care, patience, and love shown towards my senior dog were heartwarming. Total spa-day vibes! Cody has never looked happier or more relaxed after grooming.

Thank you so much, Cindy! You’ve got lifelong fans in us.

Highly recommend Cindy’s to anyone looking for exceptional grooming care, especially for older fur babies.

cindys-doggie-parlour-cape-town.author: Juanita Matheson
cindys-doggie-parlour-cape-town.text: Cindy did an amazing job grooming my Yorkie.  She loves animals and this amplifies her kindness. As I was picking up my dog I overheard her offering free grooming to a dog rescued by a shelter. She is very knowledgeable. Thank you so much Cindy

cindys-doggie-parlour-cape-town.author: Ruby Bothma
cindys-doggie-parlour-cape-town.text: I had great experience taking my fur babies to Cindy’s parlor! They loved her and I can see that she has a great love for animals. They felt comfortable with her and she delivered professional service for a great price! Would definitely recommend :)

cindys-doggie-parlour-cape-town.author: Chuanelle Britz
cindys-doggie-parlour-cape-town.text: Absolutely amazing. Someone who cares about the animals and are passionate about her job. Will take my doggies there anytime again 😍

cindys-doggie-parlour-cape-town.author: Yvonne Koekemoer
cindys-doggie-parlour-cape-town.text: Absolutely love taking my boy to Cindy - he always comes back looking and smelling beautiful 😍

clippers-grooming-parlour-cape-town.author: summer kins
clippers-grooming-parlour-cape-town.text: I will never take my scotty dogs here again.  The owner slammed the door in anger after I complained.  He basically shaved all the hair off so that the skin is showing (because there were some knots) in order to give them a good clean up after the winter.  No beard, no whiskers, no skirt after we paid R850 for the two dogs. Shocking!

clippers-grooming-parlour-cape-town.author: Heather Wickham
clippers-grooming-parlour-cape-town.text: I've lived in the neighborhood for 47yrs & all my dogs thru the years have been attending this parlor. At the moment our two Pugs are groomed there with a Reverse cut which reduces their hair shedding. I'm always very happy with their service provided.

clippers-grooming-parlour-cape-town.author: Carol Leo
clippers-grooming-parlour-cape-town.text: Really enjoy taking our Oscie to Clippers. ...he's so relaxed when collecting him after his grooming

clippers-grooming-parlour-cape-town.author: JJ van Vuuren
clippers-grooming-parlour-cape-town.text:
I have two very busy great danes and a Maltese poodle. One of my great danes even gave them some trouble and they ended up having to wash him 4 times (he had a runny tummy)

My dogs still came home beautifully groomed and the staff were courteous, understanding and exceptionally friendly.

Definitely recommend

clippers-grooming-parlour-cape-town.author: Bianca Mercedes Lee
clippers-grooming-parlour-cape-town.text: I have a very old poodle who has some trust issues and a habit of biting people when being washed. Took her to Clippers and she didn't bite once and came back looking like a beautiful old princess!

cutiepie-grooming-parlour-cape-town.author: Rozanne Anderson
cutiepie-grooming-parlour-cape-town.text: Took my Biewer Yorkie to Cutie Pie to get cute again, what a disaster. Paula went in with beautiful hair and relativly long ponytail, poor thing when she came out there. Scared and not feeling herself. This people have no idea about grooming. Not only did they shave about all her hair, it is not even all over and no ponytail at all and I have to say again not even a strait cut. Cutie Pie, it feel like you just stole R190.00 from me and left Paula “kaalgat” not herself, laying next to the toilet for 2 days. Not a very happy mommy. From me, you deserve no star at all.

cutiepie-grooming-parlour-cape-town.author: Empath Hands
cutiepie-grooming-parlour-cape-town.text: cutiepie has been the groomers we have used for a few years they overall do great work. at times it feels a little rushed but overall well done with friendly staff.

cutiepie-grooming-parlour-cape-town.author: Heinrich Groenewald
cutiepie-grooming-parlour-cape-town.text: Wont recommend, took my dog in a week and a half ago, they phoned me cause she was aggressive, when i got there she was hiding in the corner and i had to hold her to get cut and washed, since then we were in and out from one vet to the next, she had a hurt leg and was emotionless and today started having seizures. We are about R6000 in on vet costs and had to leave her at the animal hospital tonight so they could put her on seizure watch. Hospital costs they said can go from R12k to R18k if all goes well. Otherwise mri will be a extra R15k on top of the hospital costs.

cutiepie-grooming-parlour-cape-town.author: Joanne Fisher
cutiepie-grooming-parlour-cape-town.text:
I took my Yorkie to the Brackenfell branch of Cutie Pie Doggy Parlour for her first-ever grooming experience, and I am extremely disappointed. I specifically asked for a round puppy face cut, but her pony was chopped way too short, leaving a massive gap in the back. Her overall cut was choppy and uneven, her nails were barely trimmed, and worst of all, her private area was injured from the shaver.

To make matters worse, when I sent an email with pictures expressing my concerns, all I received was a vague response asking which branch I visited and how many dogs I brought—no sincere apology, no attempt to address the issue.

This was my Yorkie’s first experience at a grooming parlour, and it was completely ruined. I expected professional service and care, but instead, I was left deeply disappointed. Updating the review: I got a phone call from the owner who apologized, gave a warning to the groomer and offered a free grooming session for my yorkie.

cutiepie-grooming-parlour-cape-town.author: Anneke Frank
cutiepie-grooming-parlour-cape-town.text:
Service was excellent! All the staff was very friendly and helpful, especially the receptionist Anelle. Very well priced.
We had a great time.
Absolutely recommend Cutie Pie Doggy Parlour.

doggie-land-parlour-and-shop-cape-town.author: Nadine Khotoo
doggie-land-parlour-and-shop-cape-town.text:
They have definitely gained a lifelong customer.  My fur baby beautifully cleaned and has a summer cut.
Her hair was so matted and nails very long that it hurt her. But the staff did an amazing job.

doggie-land-parlour-and-shop-cape-town.author: Caitlin Olymp
doggie-land-parlour-and-shop-cape-town.text:
Hi,

I wanted to express my heartfelt appreciation for the exceptional service I received from Chardonnay at Doggy Lane Paro today. She was friendly, helpful, and went above and beyond to make my little dog Luna feel special and comfortable in their space.

Chardonnay took the time to have a detailed conversation with the groomer, ensuring that all my requests and concerns were addressed. She also checked in with me multiple times to ensure I was happy and comfortable with the grooming session, making me feel truly valued as a customer.

What impressed me most was her dedication to providing top-notch service - she even called me to update me on Luna's progress. This level of service is truly rare and I was blown away by her professionalism and kindness.

Thank you, Chardonnay, for providing excellent customer service. Your dedication to making customers and their pets feel welcome is truly appreciated, and I will definitely be returning to Doggy Lane Paro because of your outstanding service. Please pass on my gratitude to the groomer as well.

Kims Regards
Marlene

doggie-land-parlour-and-shop-cape-town.author: Mandie Scholtz
doggie-land-parlour-and-shop-cape-town.text: I made an appointment with the mobile parlour for 14 January which was for understandable reasons cancelled and rescheduled for 18 January.  This was again rescheduled for the 21st of January at 10:30.  By 17:45 nobody has pitched up after at 10:15 they confirmed they will come on the 21st.  And no phone call or message send.  When I followed up they read my message but dont offer any excuse or solution

doggie-land-parlour-and-shop-cape-town.author: Marco Hamilton
doggie-land-parlour-and-shop-cape-town.text: 1st experience. Was afraid that Luna would not adapt. Within 5 min she was calm. Fast service. Knip, dip, wash, deworm in 30 minutes no my girl is beautiful.and tick free and not scratching. Dankie span . Ek boek julle elke maand vir Luna en Pablo

doggie-land-parlour-and-shop-cape-town.author: Hein Eksteen
doggie-land-parlour-and-shop-cape-town.text: I couldn't stay quiet on this one. They charge more for matted dogs than normal dogs, yet our one dog got one huge gash across her chest. The lady I saw grooming grabs the dogs by their facial hair so they do not try keep the groomer from trimming their facial hair. They do not have a a grooming arm or grooming loop. I'm in between two minds as to who is at fault. The owner or the lady who did the grooming. Yes they admitted fault but I feel like there is something really wrong how our animals are treated while we aren't there to protect them. We get a cute trimmed dog back that was most likely been the most horendes experience while in their care. The dog will now have to be taken to the vet to treat her wounds. This is in their Parow branch

elite-mobile-pet-groomers-cape-town.author: Nadine Joubert
elite-mobile-pet-groomers-cape-town.text:
I am so happy we came across Elite Mobile Groomer! Our dogs have never been professionally groomed before we’ve only ever done DIY grooming at home so we weren’t sure how they would react. The team was incredibly professional, gentle, and patient, and they took such wonderful care of both our dogs. They honestly exceeded all our expectations.

We will definitely be using them again! And the Christmas bandanas were the cutest touch such a lovely surprise. Highly recommended!

elite-mobile-pet-groomers-cape-town.author: M Ryhlander
elite-mobile-pet-groomers-cape-town.text: I'm COMPLETELY shocked to say the least..and disgusted .....and we are still traumatized. When they took my dog out of the trailer she was coughing trying to breathe. I went up to her and noticed they had tied a rope around her neck. My heart stopped....the rope was so tight that I couldn't get my fingers under it to untie the rope. ABSOLUTELY DISGUSTING.......and to top it off, it doesnt even look like she was groomed. She's been limping very badly since and they obviously hurt her leg....ALL THAT TRAUMA for nothing....don't offer this service if you treat dogs like that!!!!!I'm so upset...

elite-mobile-pet-groomers-cape-town.author: Shanon Meyer
elite-mobile-pet-groomers-cape-town.text: Happy that found elite mobile pet groomers for my Pomeranian Archie. Don’t trust anyone to groom him but the team in Elite Mobile is the best definitely booking again soon.

elite-mobile-pet-groomers-cape-town.author: Shanelle Gopal
elite-mobile-pet-groomers-cape-town.text:
Our ambassapup Indie had his first groom today!
What an amazing experience and the guys are so friendly, not to mention the convenience of being able to pay by card, Indie will definitely see you guys on a monthly!

He even got a free bandana!

elite-mobile-pet-groomers-cape-town.author: F S
elite-mobile-pet-groomers-cape-town.text: Absolutely would recommend Elite Mobile Pet Groomers! They take their time, Nala loved her wash and cut, even got a cute bandana for Christmas 🎄 thank you guys!

fab-u-pet-grooming-cape-town.author: Saskia Greveling
fab-u-pet-grooming-cape-town.text: Our 11 month old cocker spaniel puppy had never been to the parlour before so we were quite apprehensive about the first visit. However, Fab-U Grooming was absolutely amazing from start to finish - our boy came home looking chic, and his coat shining and super soft! The team were so friendly, non-judgmental about his matted coat and Alfie, our pup, arrived home smiling! Thank you Fab-U Grooming! We’ll be back!

fab-u-pet-grooming-cape-town.author: Jakkie Brink
fab-u-pet-grooming-cape-town.text: I have been meaning to write a review since December. I live in Noordhoek and during the December rush could find no availability to have my 6-year old black Spaniel trimmed/shaved. I eventually phoned Fabu Pets, set out over Ou Kaapse Weg and went out for a working lunch while my Baxter got the full treatment. I was so happy with the outcome! Previously Baxter was shaved too short on his tummy and sides and got razor burn. At Fabu Pets he came back looking fabulous! I feel that the trip to Rondebosch was totally worth it and will consider doing it again next time. Thank you Fabu Pets for a fantastic service.

fab-u-pet-grooming-cape-town.author: Ryan Vrede
fab-u-pet-grooming-cape-town.text: My bully Roxy has developed a skin condition that has caused me a lot of stress. Warren, the owner, and his team have gone above and beyond to help her recover. From suggesting a treatment, to directing me to a vet that has been caring and invested, their care has set my mind at ease and really made a massive difference. I can't recommend them highly enough.

fab-u-pet-grooming-cape-town.author: Maryke Hennig
fab-u-pet-grooming-cape-town.text: A FABULOUS experience at Fab-U Pet Grooming! Ludwig the Pug has never been so smooth, clean, smelling GOOD, he looked like a brand new dog! THANK you for accommodating us before work just to make it easier for me, and for the amazing treatment on arrival! Ludwig and I felt like VIPs, and were in such experienced, and caring hands......The ONLY groomer I will be returning to over and over! 😘😘😘

fab-u-pet-grooming-cape-town.author: Daniella Bledig
fab-u-pet-grooming-cape-town.text: I had the best experience with their mobile service today. My dogs look better than they ever had , they were so calm and happy during and after which rarely happens. I cannot express how happy I am and I just wish I found them sooner !! Great job guys !

fresh-hair-pet-salon-cape-town.author: Kay Adonis
fresh-hair-pet-salon-cape-town.text: The groomers was just wonderful. I have a very calm dog and the attention to his state of mind was welcomed. They were alway busy talking to her, rubbing her and I think that they are aware of how stressful it can be for the dog. I must also give them a thumbs up for soldiering through the tons of hair that coming out with the brushing and let me just say that we all looked like hair snowmen afterwards. The calm energy that they bring is definitely what I appreciate when working with animals. Thank you and I'll definitely come again

fresh-hair-pet-salon-cape-town.author: TeNeale Meaker
fresh-hair-pet-salon-cape-town.text: Very friendly service from all who work here! They truly love dogs, and I feel comfortable leaving my dogs with them!

fresh-hair-pet-salon-cape-town.author: joshua cloete
fresh-hair-pet-salon-cape-town.text: Took very good care of our dogs definitely my place to go

fresh-hair-pet-salon-cape-town.author: Ronel Agrela
fresh-hair-pet-salon-cape-town.text: Thanks so much for my Schnauzers excellent cut. I feel so welcome there and your staff is so helpful and friendly. Really listen to the customers need.Just have peace of mind leaving them there and know they will  take good care of my fury kids. Compliments and appreciation to your staff. Keep up the excellent service😁

fresh-hair-pet-salon-cape-town.author: Anina Black
fresh-hair-pet-salon-cape-town.text: We would like to express our appreciation to Karen and her team for the wonderful assistance with our older cat.  Not only did they pick him up and drop him back home in a lovely carrier, but they were handling him with care and was sensitive to our worries.  Although he was happy to be home later that day it took the other cats a couple of hours to three days to accept the "new look" of short haired, poodle style, squirrel tailed cat.  But all back to normal and he is happily grooming himself.

groomers-dog-parlour-cape-town.author: Yvette Nieuwoudt
groomers-dog-parlour-cape-town.text: Derinice and her team and caring kind and relax my highly strung dog. I took all three at once expecting disaster but they were amazing and now I have clean, flealess and happy fur babies

groomers-dog-parlour-cape-town.author: Glenda Jonathan
groomers-dog-parlour-cape-town.text: My dogs have been going to Derineé and her team for a while now and I have always been happy with how they manage to deshed and thin out my dogs long thick hair and they come back fluffy and cuddly and smelling divine. Their pick up and drop off service is also such a lifesaver for me.

groomers-dog-parlour-cape-town.author: Chantal Muller
groomers-dog-parlour-cape-town.text: My Storm has been going to Groomers since a puppy. He's a difficult big boy, but they manage him so well. They are the best.

groomers-dog-parlour-cape-town.author: Ashley
groomers-dog-parlour-cape-town.text: Dog smelled amazing, loved that she got a pink ribbon, The scheduling for collection was accurate 👌.  The only issue I had was the nails was cut but was not filed, so they were pretty sharp. Maybe owners can look into this. Price's was really decent however, they can only take card payments over R150 anything under is cash. Overall iam satisfied.

groomers-dog-parlour-cape-town.author: C M J Venter
groomers-dog-parlour-cape-town.text: What a JOY, the most incredible team of animal passionate individuals. Listens and understand dogs "needs, ailments" etc.  Must admit I'm a fur dad that doesn't leave the side of my k9 but I wasn't stressed. Definitely recommend them.

jenis-pet-parlour-cape-town.author: Warren Patientia
jenis-pet-parlour-cape-town.text: We were so immensely happy with the excellent service, friendliness of the staff and the amount of love and care shown that went beyond service delivery. A truly wonderful place and highly recommended to all! Our little Coco left happy and we were immensely grateful for this experience. Outstanding experience!

jenis-pet-parlour-cape-town.author: jed barendse
jenis-pet-parlour-cape-town.text:
I took my 4 month old Corgi in for his first groom with Jen’s team today. I have been so nervous about finding the right parlour to take him to and ensure his first experience is a positive one. I am so glad I chose to take him here! It was so fast, the team were all extremely friendly and he had a great time. Even left with a “party pack” of treats!

Will definitely be bringing him for all his future grooms

jenis-pet-parlour-cape-town.author: Leizel Benjafield
jenis-pet-parlour-cape-town.text: Wow,  wow and wow again. Tova, our rescue, had a groom today. Mom and I were so nervous as she has never had a cut before. The guys cuddled her, had treats on hand before they even started. We sat for about 5 minutes but Tova knew we were there and kept moaning. Jeni suggested we go for a walk. This settled Tova. Such kind and gentle staff both to humans and animals. They kept phoning to keep us updated and settled. Amazing place.

jenis-pet-parlour-cape-town.author: Amy Launder
jenis-pet-parlour-cape-town.text: Our second time taking our spaniel Honey to Jeni’s and I can truly say they are the most fantastic team there is! Our poor girl was covered in foxtails and other grass seeds after a run at Rhodes memorial, and little did we know but they had dug so deeply they had punctured through her skin! The team managed to squeeze us in as it was a bit of an emergency and Liz made me aware of the foxtail issue and advised we take her to the vet, and in the space of less than an hour she was being sent in for surgery to remove the foxtails from her skin.  Without Jeni’s team we would have only realised this issue once cysts had formed. Thank you Jeni’s you are absolute hero’s! Thank you for making our girl look beautiful, even if she now has to be shaved for surgery… she raked in the compliments at the vet!

jenis-pet-parlour-cape-town.author: Srinath Ananthanarayanan
jenis-pet-parlour-cape-town.text:
The best place to groom your pets. If you are worried about how they handle your babies and if they are in good hands. This is the place to go to. Our pets have been going here ever since we moved to Capetown.

Very professional, very gentle and best of all very knowledgeable.

A big thank you to the team at Jenis.

just-groom-it-pet-grooming-service-cape-.author: Storm Marais
just-groom-it-pet-grooming-service-cape-.text: So happy with my service! I dropped my little Brandi off at 9:30 and at 10:00 I got the call that she was ready, I was a bit worried because surely they couldn’t be finished so fast but when I arrived and saw her I was so impressed, she had terrible knots in her legs and they were still able to give me the exact cut I wanted with the bootlegs. Thank you so much for taking such good care of my pup  😊

just-groom-it-pet-grooming-service-cape-.author: Reeva Wyngaard
just-groom-it-pet-grooming-service-cape-.text: We are so happy with the grooming service for our Yorkie, Nala. She came back looking beautiful, clean, and well cute as hec!! Haha. The team is friendly, gentle, and clearly loves the dogs they work with. It gives us real peace of mind knowing she’s in such good hands.

just-groom-it-pet-grooming-service-cape-.author: Sharné Denner
just-groom-it-pet-grooming-service-cape-.text: Brilliant groomers en friendly staff. They’ve groomed and shaved both our ragdoll and persian cats. Our kitties always come back smelling fresh, clean and well-shaved and happy. Will recommend these guys to anyone looking for a reputable, gentle groomer for cats. Thank you for stellar, professional service!

just-groom-it-pet-grooming-service-cape-.author: Lauren Hall
just-groom-it-pet-grooming-service-cape-.text: I took my Cocker Spaniel here for grooming and couldn’t be happier with the experience! The staff were so friendly, gentle, and patient with my dog, and you can really tell they love what they do. My pup came out looking absolutely beautiful soft, shiny, and smelling amazing! They paid great attention to detail, especially around the ears and paws, which can be tricky with Cocker Spaniels. The whole place is clean, calm, and welcoming. I’ll definitely be bringing my dog back again. Highly recommend! 🐶✂️💛

just-groom-it-pet-grooming-service-cape-.author: Tyla
just-groom-it-pet-grooming-service-cape-.text: Riley has been going here for a few years now and he always is groomed so well. They are all kind and caring towards the dogs.

lovely-pets-grooming-parlour-and-mobile-.author: Dee Searle
lovely-pets-grooming-parlour-and-mobile-.text: I am so happy with the service I got from Lovely Pets Grooming. They were friendly and reliable. Their mobile unit managed to fit me in last minute and they groomed our old boy Simba so beautifully. He is 15 and has bad legs and they wetr so gentle with him. I will definitely book with them again, I highly recommend their service. Easy , reliable, friendly and efficient!

lovely-pets-grooming-parlour-and-mobile-.author: Charmaine Odendaal
lovely-pets-grooming-parlour-and-mobile-.text: My cat was treated to a mobile spa.  She loved it - they treated her with care and calm approach.  She is beautifully clean and smells wonderful.   I highly recommend their services.

lovely-pets-grooming-parlour-and-mobile-.author: Terina Coetzee
lovely-pets-grooming-parlour-and-mobile-.text: Hands down the best mobile pet wash we’ve used! Our Jack Russell and Pomeranian came back looking and smelling amazing. They really understand Pomeranian coats — no matting, just soft, beautiful fluff. The dogs were calm and happy the whole time. 10/10 recommend!

lovely-pets-grooming-parlour-and-mobile-.author: Tristian Macdonald
lovely-pets-grooming-parlour-and-mobile-.text:
This is the second time I have used your services, obviously the first time the doggies were a bit skeptical because it was new people, but they handled them with love and care and at the end of the day the doggies were well groomed and happy.

Today (the second time they came to groom the doggies) My one boy recognized them and was absolutely relaxed and calm when they took him into the back of the trailer, not only did my dog remember the staff but the staff in turn remembered both my doggies and treated them with absolute love and affection. They did an amazing job at shaving my husky and cutting his nails and bathing him, and in my opinion it is super rare for a mobile service to groom a dog without injury especially when it comes to cutting nails.Dont get me wrong accidents do happen, but that is mostly because mobile groomers are trying to rush the appointment so that they can make their next appointment and fit in more appointments in a day.However this is not the case with this groomer as they take the time to calm the dog and to gently work their way through everything that needs to be done. Then when it come to my other boy he is in general a frightened dog as he is a rescue dog and when they took him into the trailer he did get scared and made a accident on their floor, but the response from the staff where amazing, they stopped with everything in the trailer and took the time to pet him and to let him know that he is safe and okay and they showed him love and affection to calm him down. After which they then continued to preform their grooming duties. I would highly recommend their services to anyone, as any person who has doggies would understand the stress and confusion a dog goes through if they had to be taken to a strange building filled with barking dogs and cats and all sorts of animals and then to have their owner leave them with complete strangers. What this company offers is a safe and comfortable environment for the dogs to get the treatment they need whilst not having to be taken away from the place that they call home. Thank you for giving my doggies your professionalism and care.

lovely-pets-grooming-parlour-and-mobile-.author: Lindi Visser
lovely-pets-grooming-parlour-and-mobile-.text: I had my two dogs washed and the team was absolutely excellent! They handled everything with such care, and my dog was so calm throughout the wash. Great job all around – highly recommend. Thank you, Lindi from Durbanville!

mobile-paws-grooming-cape-town.author: Irma Human
mobile-paws-grooming-cape-town.text:
Absolutely amazing service from Mobile Paws! 🐾

The convenience of having a professional grooming service come straight to your home makes the whole experience so stress-free, for both pets and owners. The team is incredibly friendly, patient, and clearly passionate about what they do.

My pet came back looking fantastic, smelling fresh, and most importantly, happy and relaxed. You can really tell they take the time to make sure every animal is comfortable during the grooming process.

Highly recommend Mobile Paws to any pet parent looking for a reliable, caring, and professional mobile grooming service. We’ll definitely be booking again! 🐶✨

mobile-paws-grooming-cape-town.author: Marlene De Wet
mobile-paws-grooming-cape-town.text:
Blake’s first grooming session with Mobile Paws was for me the best by far.
Responding to messages is very quick .
They are  wet punctual
They are very friendly
And last but jot least, Blake looked absolutely beautiful when they were done. Thank you very much, I really appreciate you take your time to take care of him..

We will call soon again.. 🫶🐾

mobile-paws-grooming-cape-town.author: Michelle Clack
mobile-paws-grooming-cape-town.text:
My Furr Babies looks soooo Pretty!!
All thanks to the Mobile Paws Team
To the lady and gentle man that came out to my home today, you were amazing
Thank you for treating my furry babies with so much love and care 💕

mobile-paws-grooming-cape-town.author: Bernadise Lopes
mobile-paws-grooming-cape-town.text:
We have 2 very old Spaniels, one deaf and one with joint problems. Knowing how sensitive and scared they are, we had to be very careful in choosing who handles our dogs.

I am in awe with how gentle, caring and loving the Mobile Paws team worked with our furry babies. Our dogs looks beautiful, clean and extremely happy.

The booking application was effortless, the communication great and overall experience remarkable. Thank you Mobile Paws for taking so good care of our Spaniels. We'll highly recommend your service to anyone!

mobile-paws-grooming-cape-town.author: Anne-Marie Lawtie
mobile-paws-grooming-cape-town.text: 12 Happy paws here. Waggy tail service for our 3 fur babies. Recommend strongly!!

pampered-paws-claremont-cape-town.author: Natalie
pampered-paws-claremont-cape-town.text:
I previously had entrusted Pampered Paws Claremont with my dog for years, however, my experience within the last couple of months has not been good repeatedly. There has been numerous occasions my dog has been nicked during a groom despite me mentioning it before as it always happens in a specific area, it happened again and this time it was bad. My dog has cuts around her private area on several spots and her leg this time. She is extremely uncomfortable, today I witnessed the wound bleeding. While I know this is a risk while grooming, the way she was cut this time reflects a lack proper attention and care during grooming.

Further, I dropped my dog off at 09h30 for her scheduled appointment, I called at 11h30 to check in as it usually takes about 2 hours and my dog was not attended to yet. I feel like the groom was rushed in the end leading to my dog being cut badly in certain areas.

My dog was eventually ready 4 hours later (13h30pm) and I made my way back to pick her up. While on my way they called me at 13h35 to ask where I am as they closing at 2pm despite me previously stating I am on my way and I got there before 2pm. I feel that it was wrong since my dog's appointment was for 09h30 already and then they ended up rushing the whole process and then chasing me on just before closing time.

The front desk staff member apologised when I asked about the 4 hour waiting time and he said they were understaffed which I understand and I sympathise with, BUT I am less tolerant of the lack of care and gentleness they displayed during my dog's groom and the fact that they hurt her badly this time.

I've always supported pampered paws but I am beyond disappointed and let down by this experience and I would consider taking my dog to alternative parlor where she is in better hands.

pampered-paws-claremont-cape-town.author: Pamela Brennan
pampered-paws-claremont-cape-town.text: Oli loves going to Pampered Paws. Thank you for always taking such good care of him.

pampered-paws-claremont-cape-town.author: Rosa-Karoo Loewe
pampered-paws-claremont-cape-town.text: Took Shishi (my Pomeranian cross) for the first time for the Full Groom and asked specifically for the shortest summer cut possible and boy, did they deliver! Wonderful staff, very well priced, and he looks like a little rat (with no shave cuts!) and smells great. No more panting for my overbite rescue pup 🐶 10/10

pampered-paws-claremont-cape-town.author: Imran Solwa
pampered-paws-claremont-cape-town.text:
Extremely disappointed with the booking system and overall professionalism.

I arrived promptly at 11:30am with my dog for a confirmed appointment, only to be told at reception that I did not have a booking. The staff member, Walid, said my name did not appear on their system. I then showed the confirmation email, which clearly proves that I did have a booking.

I was told the booking was “not confirmed,” which makes absolutely no sense — if a confirmation email is sent, what more confirmation is needed? I have never experienced such a poorly managed booking process.

Despite arriving on time and having proof of my appointment, I was turned away because they were too full. This shows a complete lack of respect for customers’ time and poor internal organisation.

This experience left a very bitter taste . I am currently awaiting feedback for what has happened. and have attached the evidence to let it be known.

pampered-paws-claremont-cape-town.author: Ulyana Ustinova
pampered-paws-claremont-cape-town.text: Pampered Paws Claremont did an absolutely amazing job grooming my puppy! The haircut is perfect—neat, even, and makes my pup look even more adorable. The staff was incredibly friendly, professional, and made sure my puppy felt comfortable throughout the process. The attention to detail and care they put into their work is truly impressive. Highly recommend them for top-notch grooming and excellent service!

pampered-paws-sea-point-cape-town.author: Alegna “Angii”
pampered-paws-sea-point-cape-town.text: I've been bringing my GSD Cross to Pampered Paws every 3-4 months for a full groom since her adoption 5 years ago, and it's always been a good experience. They're very gentle with her and patient with her nervousness and reactivity. She comes back clean, smooth, soft, no crazy shedding anymore, and 70% dry but she's got a double coat so I can't complain😅

pampered-paws-sea-point-cape-town.author: Tayla Brown
pampered-paws-sea-point-cape-town.text:
I am very disappointed with my repeated experiences at Pampered Paws, across both Claremont and Sea Point branches. I was first unhappy with Claremont (due to booking issues) and thought I’d give Sea Point a try.

On multiple occasions, my bookings have been mishandled at both. I have arrived for confirmed appointments only to be told there was no booking, or that only one of my two dogs had been booked instead of both. This has happened more than once, despite clear confirmation beforehand.

More concerning are the grooming incidents themselves. On a previous visit, one of my dogs was nicked during shaving and I was not informed. I raised this calmly and explained that while I understand accidents can happen, transparency is essential so that I can properly monitor my dog. I was assured this would be addressed.

Unfortunately, during my most recent visit in January, I arrived to collect my dogs only to find one was still not finished, despite being told they were done. Once home, I discovered that one dog’s ear had been cut severely, with bleeding and even a small portion missing. His paw pad had also been cut during trimming, none of which was disclosed to me.

I would far rather wait longer for my dogs to be groomed carefully than be told they are ready and then rushed through the process, resulting in preventable injuries. I wish I could have included photographs for clarity, but my dog was so distressed afterwards that he would not allow me near his ears or paws. At this point, the issue goes beyond poor organisation and communication and raises serious concerns about transparency and duty of care. I have given multiple chances and raised concerns respectfully, yet seen no improvement. Sadly, I cannot recommend Pampered Paws based on my experiences.

pampered-paws-sea-point-cape-town.author: Lana Mazahreh
pampered-paws-sea-point-cape-town.text:
They say a picture is worth a thousand words so here are two pictures and a video! One of the groomers this morning not only cut my doggie’s nails so so short that it was painful impacting his walk and making him constantly lick, but one of them was even bleeding.

When I went back to ask him what happened, his exact words were: “I did his nails very right.” With mega attitude too! Just when I was hoping for an explanation, perhaps some remorse, or a genuine apology, I got a rude attitude and many lies (ones that kept changing), eventually blaming my dog for what happened.

He will never lay hands on any of my dogs EVER again, but if you’re a loyal customer to this parlor, I encourage you to demand a retraining across all groomers, as I surely hope this doesn’t happen to any of your beloved furry ones.

Shame on everyone I interacted with at Pampered Paws today. Sorry my dear doggie, mama will choose better in the future. Your paws matter.

pampered-paws-sea-point-cape-town.author: Molly mc william smith
pampered-paws-sea-point-cape-town.text: Just got the best service from Raka and Joshua. They really do this business proud. Thank you for an awesome experience and for giving my dogs such superb treatment.

pampered-paws-sea-point-cape-town.author: Marinette Roux
pampered-paws-sea-point-cape-town.text:
I have taken my border collie to the Sea Point branch twice, and have been disappointed both times. I booked online for a full groom; when I checked her in at the parlor the groomer filled in a form and ticked off what needed to be done, and we specifically asked for a nail/paw trim.

When we picked her up, we paid R325 before she was brought out to us. When I had a proper look at home, I noted that her nails were not clipped and the paws were not trimmed as we had asked, and paid for. So basically, I paid R325 for a wash which I could have done at home.

Will not be using them again.

park-andbark-mobile-dog-grooming-cape-to.author: Ameer Allie
park-andbark-mobile-dog-grooming-cape-to.text: Lyn the owner was a joy bubbly personality took well care of my pet

parlor-dog-cape-town.author: Bronwyn Amm
parlor-dog-cape-town.text: I’ve been bringing my two chows to Nick for over 8 years, and I can’t recommend him enough! His love for animals truly shines through in his work. Each time, my dogs receive excellent care, from cleaning to dipping, and the overall service is just fantastic. It’s such a relief to have someone so passionate and skilled taking care of them. If you’re looking for a parlour that goes above and beyond, this is the place to trust!

parlor-dog-cape-town.author: Diana Wiesner
parlor-dog-cape-town.text: Our dogs love going for their bi-weekly wash. They are collected from our home and brought back safely. They come home happy and clean. Thanks Nick and team for your wonderful service. Coco, Lola and Mia are grateful for you all.

parlor-dog-cape-town.author: Raymond Williams
parlor-dog-cape-town.text:
Nic from Parlor Dog is genuinely dedicated to dogs, and it shows in every aspect of his service. He personally handles the pickup and drop-off of my pups, making the whole process convenient and stress-free.

From the moment they arrived, it was clear they were in good hands, looked fantastic and were clearly happy and well-cared for.

I highly recommend Parlor Dog to anyone seeking a compassionate and professional groomer. It’s evident that Nic truly loves what he does, and I completely trust him with my furry friends!

parlor-dog-cape-town.author: Chantal Rens
parlor-dog-cape-town.text: Nic and his groomers have always delivered the most amazing, kind service to my various poodles over the years. They are kind and caring to my dogs despite being tormented by some of them on occasion. I have and would continue to recommend Nic to anyone who loves their dogs as much as I do.

parlor-dog-cape-town.author: Katherine Eve
parlor-dog-cape-town.text: My pooch loves Nick and his grooming sessions. Nick and his team understand and take gentle care of the animals and know exactly what to do. Consistently excellent service and treat for my furry.

paws-doggie-parlour-cape-town.author: Fiona Martin
paws-doggie-parlour-cape-town.text: Gloria and Lucy luv with their clean, fresh summer puppy cut. Big thank you to Onyx.

paws-doggie-parlour-cape-town.author: Adriaan Swartz
paws-doggie-parlour-cape-town.text: Prices change overnight with reaseans being "it's more hair" on a dog we took there for 2 years. 🤣

paws-doggie-parlour-cape-town.author: Jackie Van der Walt
paws-doggie-parlour-cape-town.text: Everytime I go there we specifically ask for our dogs to be shaved and then bathed. For some reason the lady af the front desk is very ignorant. She says they are washing them after their groom which is of course a lie. They are full of hair when they come out of there. On top of that she is also rude.

paws-doggie-parlour-cape-town.author: Chery Land
paws-doggie-parlour-cape-town.text: Excellent friendly service. Doggies and cats are treated with love and care and look gorgeous when done. Rates good very affordable!

paws-pet-parlour-and-boutique-cape-town.author: Analia Kuyler
paws-pet-parlour-and-boutique-cape-town.text: I can definitely recommend Paws Pet Parlour. My boy has been there and yesterday my mum's dog was there too. Another parlour said mummy's dog wanted to bite them so they couldn't groom her. But there she went to Paws and she was happy and smiling and so relaxed! And her hair and nails looked great too! Pomeranians need to be cut in a very specific manner and few manage to do it properly but again Paws did a magnificent job! My boy looks fantastic! Very happy customer!

paws-pet-parlour-and-boutique-cape-town.author: Kimberleigh Brooker
paws-pet-parlour-and-boutique-cape-town.text: I took my two Yorkies (their first ever parlour visit) to Paws Parlour and had such a great experience! The groomer was incredibly patient and kind with both of them. Ollie can get a bit feisty during grooming and Milo is quite nervous, but they both came out calm, happy, and beautifully groomed. Their coats look fantastic, and it’s clear he truly cares about the dogs he works with. He exceeded my expectations — highly recommend!

paws-pet-parlour-and-boutique-cape-town.author: Celine Van Biljon
paws-pet-parlour-and-boutique-cape-town.text: I'm so incredibly happy with how my baby's first grooming turned out I am a very happy dog mom thank you paws ❤️❤️

paws-pet-parlour-and-boutique-cape-town.author: N DG
paws-pet-parlour-and-boutique-cape-town.text: Thank u Onix yet again for George my Shneizers groom, wash and cut. Fabulous and friendly staff which never have a bad day. Much appreciated many thanks  Greg, George and Skippy.

paws-pet-parlour-and-boutique-cape-town.author: Loren Saacks
paws-pet-parlour-and-boutique-cape-town.text: Our dogs have been going to Paws Pet Parlour for many years now. As you can see our dogs look great and are so happy! Onyx and his team do a great job and are always so friendly and caring 🤗 Highly recommend them!

pet-groomer-pawfect-groom-dog-groomer-ca.author: Mr H MALLUM
pet-groomer-pawfect-groom-dog-groomer-ca.text:
PAWFECTGROOM is the best mobile Dog Wash I came across they do everything
They have a variety you can choose from
Nails, Ears, Teeth ,Tick and Flea and even Glands

Keep up the great work Pawfect Groom definitely something I’ll want my Boy Koda To revisit

pet-groomer-pawfect-groom-dog-groomer-ca.author: Jill Martin
pet-groomer-pawfect-groom-dog-groomer-ca.text: We received such amazing service from the team at Pawfect Grooming. Friendly staff. Thank you for your patience with Nova. Hopefully her second cut will be much better.

pet-groomer-pawfect-groom-dog-groomer-ca.author: Lucinda Booisen
pet-groomer-pawfect-groom-dog-groomer-ca.text: Thank you, Shivani, for grooming my fur baby  I truly appreciate it. Even though you were supposed to be closed today, you still assisted me. You were so welcoming and kind, and the service was outstanding. Please support her business  you won’t be disappointed! Highly recommended.

pet-groomer-pawfect-groom-dog-groomer-ca.author: Bronwyn
pet-groomer-pawfect-groom-dog-groomer-ca.text: I would like to thank the owner and the team for a job we'll done on my Chow. They were kind and very helpful when dealing with him. Would 100% use them again. 5 stars well deserved. 🌸

pet-groomer-pawfect-groom-dog-groomer-ca.author: Lyndon Adonis
pet-groomer-pawfect-groom-dog-groomer-ca.text: Thank you Shivani and team for pampering Loki.

pet-savers-or-vet-grooming-and-retail-ca.author: Isabel Hough
pet-savers-or-vet-grooming-and-retail-ca.text: The staff is always very friendly. Our dogs are treated very well and we had not had any issues when taking them for their once a month spa morning🐕😁🐾. The vet was of great help today to sort out a issue with my Labrador . Thank you for the fabulous service.

pet-savers-or-vet-grooming-and-retail-ca.author: Diana Hunter
pet-savers-or-vet-grooming-and-retail-ca.text: Always very happy with the efficiency and friendliness of the staff.  They have earned my life-time loyalty as they allowed me to return my my expensive dog food purchase because my dog had passed away unexpectedly.   Thank you for your sympathy and your empathy!!

pet-savers-or-vet-grooming-and-retail-ca.author: lildimple 000
pet-savers-or-vet-grooming-and-retail-ca.text: We took our Spaniel to get groomed, and we couldn't be happier with the service. We were met with kind staff, and our dog was groomed beautifully. Will definitely be coming back next time.

pet-savers-or-vet-grooming-and-retail-ca.author: Nia Burg
pet-savers-or-vet-grooming-and-retail-ca.text: Amazing experience in store. Love the variety of items and food and more importantly the specials for the months. Had my doggy for the dental special for an amazing price and they still give you goody gift bag. Price wise of items very good… also bought a Large bed for my dogs that in most places would cost double the price. Keep it the good work. You guys rock   .

pet-savers-or-vet-grooming-and-retail-ca.author: Marius Geyser
pet-savers-or-vet-grooming-and-retail-ca.text: Took our Yorkie for a groom. Not satisfied with the service, asymmetric results. Certain parts on body not cut. Nails not trimmed after  initial request. Recommendations for another groomer will be appreciated.

petworld-xxl-diep-river-cape-town.author: Darren
petworld-xxl-diep-river-cape-town.text:
I must commend Shaheen and Jayden on their excellent service and advice they provide me on fish keeping ,tank set up and maintenance.
They have helped me set up and incredible stable tank that has been running without issues for 4 months.

They are extremely helpful and knowledgeable ,I will continue to refer friends and family to them for all things aquarium related.

Thank you guys ,keep up the awesome work

petworld-xxl-diep-river-cape-town.author: Cece Kearns
petworld-xxl-diep-river-cape-town.text: We had a great experience at Petworld Diep River! The store is clean, well-stocked, and easy to navigate. The staff were friendly and went out of their way to help us find what we needed. I was impressed by the variety of pet products and how well the animals were cared for. Definitely my go-to pet store in the area! Can't wait to set up our new fish tank!

petworld-xxl-diep-river-cape-town.author: Liezel Genis
petworld-xxl-diep-river-cape-town.text:
We were looking for quite a specific toy. Unfortunately, we didn't find what we were looking for, but....they have an amazing variety of items and so many choices in all the sections.
We found the shop a bit pricey with a variety of items compared with some of the shops we usually visit.

What I found quite nice is, for instance, the dog treats. They have a pick-a-mix, and you can choose which size and type.
There is also a grooming area, and we could see how the dogs were groomed and handled.

The staff is super helpful, and it was such a treat when they were cleaning the cages we were able to interact with the birds.
I am sure you will find what you are looking for.

petworld-xxl-diep-river-cape-town.author: Brian Claassen
petworld-xxl-diep-river-cape-town.text: Overall, my experience at PetWorld has been good. They stock a wide variety of products, and it’s generally an enjoyable place to shop for all things pet-related. However, I have found that they’re sometimes out of stock on some of the most basic items, which can be a little frustrating. I’ve also had one or two occasions where I wasn’t completely happy with the level of service from staff in the fish section. That said, the range they carry and the overall shopping experience keep me coming back — a solid store with just a few areas that could be improved.

petworld-xxl-diep-river-cape-town.author: Richard Morris
petworld-xxl-diep-river-cape-town.text: I have not been to the store in a while and I was on this occasion assisted most professionally by a very nice staff member Nicole's (Please excuse my spelling) the difference with her and other stores were that I just left Perky Pets which was a shadow of its former self and here was this chatty friendly assistant who knew all about Super worms, natural suet and wild bird feeding. What I loved was that your stores allowed for pets to be with parents instore, and Nicolene was telling us of a clients parrots flying around in store on a recent visit. Well done. Happy place with attentive friendly staff with lots of well priced stock.

petworld-xxl-n1-city-cape-town.author: Keelyn Hart
petworld-xxl-n1-city-cape-town.text: Suspected unethical mouse breeders. I had to put down the beautiful pet mouse I adopted from here after owning him for only 6 months due to an autoimmune disease that is a result of poor breeding. You cannot imagine his pain or mine in losing him. The financial strain has also been significant. Please source your animals from proper breeders and rescue centres.

petworld-xxl-n1-city-cape-town.author: Jacqueline Schimper
petworld-xxl-n1-city-cape-town.text:
Amazing store, and the staff are great. The animals are so well looked after, all their tanks, furry pets homes are kept in such great condition.
Neat and tidy shelves, will definitely be back.
My fur babies loved their treats, and new winter jacket

petworld-xxl-n1-city-cape-town.author: Kai Schlichenmaier
petworld-xxl-n1-city-cape-town.text: Friendly staff. Good variety of products presented very neatly and organised. I also appreciate that they have proper, specific cages for different small animals like hamsters, mice, rats, rabbits etc, as opposed to just generic bird cages and hamster cages. They also keep animals like rats and mice intended for pets, and not for snake food.

petworld-xxl-n1-city-cape-town.author: Nicola Roos
petworld-xxl-n1-city-cape-town.text:
Very pricey. The janitor also seemed to be quite rude to the poor Cockatoo for dirtying his cage soon after she'd cleaned it out. I would also have appreciated it if there were more staff members on the floor to answer questions  (I ended up having to ask the cashier).
Good variety of pet accessories, cages and food, though.

petworld-xxl-n1-city-cape-town.author: Tilana Mostert
petworld-xxl-n1-city-cape-town.text: Find most pet accessories and the pet food is competitive. The kiddies loves watching the fish, 🦎 reptiles and occasionally r🐇bits..The  Staff are always helpful when looking for something 🧸 particularly.

pikkies-pets-and-dog-parlour-pty-ltd-cap.author: Rene Meas
pikkies-pets-and-dog-parlour-pty-ltd-cap.text: Really not a good experience. Took my Yorkie. Came back looking a hot mess. Then no discount. I paid in full. Then they tell me to let my non aggressive dog to the spca for calm meds. Really wow.

pikkies-pets-and-dog-parlour-pty-ltd-cap.author: Lisa Anastasia Van Der Schyff
pikkies-pets-and-dog-parlour-pty-ltd-cap.text:
I wish there was a minus 1star review.... I am Highly pissed off at the service I got at Pikkies pets. Firstly I dropped my yorkie at 11 am today 6/12/2025
Called them at 3:30 to find out if my doggie was done
I was told yes he is. So left to fetch him. When I got there I was then told his not done yet it will be half an hour i was confused because i was told he was done. I then paid and decided to wait. I did however mentioned to the lady so does that mean my dog has been in a cage all this time and she told me no. I kept my cool and just went to the car probably 10 minutes later they bring him out. I was just happy to see that my yokie was ok as we were driving i notice that his nails were not trimmed, he still smelt and he wasn't even trimmed properly the hair on is face was cut skew aswell on further inspection,I actually discovered that he wasn't even washed or if they claim they did he wasn't washed properly. After I get home I get a call to say i can come and fetch my doggie which means they are not even keeping track of who's dog is who. My poor doggie came home super thirsty and traumatised. I have contacted them but no response I would not recommend you take your fur babies there they are unprofessional

pikkies-pets-and-dog-parlour-pty-ltd-cap.author: Tarryn Shirley Pieterse
pikkies-pets-and-dog-parlour-pty-ltd-cap.text: So happy with the overall service of my dog's care and grooming. But I would like to just give a big thanks to the amazing couple who owns Pikkies. Thank you so much for helping me when I was stranded with car issues. I am so grateful. Stay blessed

pikkies-pets-and-dog-parlour-pty-ltd-cap.author: Rabia Ally
pikkies-pets-and-dog-parlour-pty-ltd-cap.text: I had my cat there twice for grooming, very happy 🐈🐈

pikkies-pets-and-dog-parlour-pty-ltd-cap.author: Nicole van der Leer
pikkies-pets-and-dog-parlour-pty-ltd-cap.text: Dropped my spaniel at 11am, received a call at 2:30 to say she needs a summer cut as she was very matted. I agreed, but only received a call again at 4:30 to say she can be collected. She was very thirsty, and her paws were bleeding. Will not be going back ever!

poochy-coo-the-ultimate-doggy-daycare-an.author: Karien Penderis
poochy-coo-the-ultimate-doggy-daycare-an.text: We had a very unfortunate incident that took place two weeks ago and sadly neither the owner nor the groomer wants to accept any responsibility. The VET confirmed that the clipper used was too hot and burnt our Shih Tzu under her chin. It caused a small blister, she started scratching. We are at a R3000 Vet bill now and our poor dog has to wear a cone until completely healed. It is sad when people don’t want to accept any responsibility for a small mistake. I had no expectation, than to get refunded for the Grooming session which was R600. The owner only offered credit to be used at her business, which we will definitely not return to. I highly advise not to support this business.

poochy-coo-the-ultimate-doggy-daycare-an.author: Jess Paterson
poochy-coo-the-ultimate-doggy-daycare-an.text: This was Beans' first time staying at a doggy hotel and I was quite stressed worrying about how she would handle it.  The Poochy Coo team is just amazing!  The daily video updates I received showed her having the BEST time!  I dropped off a chubby pooch and with all of the activity and lighter diet (at my request), I got back a happy, trim and healthy girl.  Poochy Coo will definitely be my go to from now on, because it is very clear how much they care about your pet... and Beans just LOVED it.  Thank you team Poochy Coo! You guys are awesome.

poochy-coo-the-ultimate-doggy-daycare-an.author: Dr Anke Leonore Roux
poochy-coo-the-ultimate-doggy-daycare-an.text:
The best dog walkers/doggy daycare in Cape Town - hands down!
My pup can never wait to get to daycare and is honestly in love with the staff at Poochy Coo! They are extremely professional, friendly and always happy to help.
My pup goes on the best adventures and always comes home happy and tired from playing with his mates all day.

poochy-coo-the-ultimate-doggy-daycare-an.author: Marius le Roux
poochy-coo-the-ultimate-doggy-daycare-an.text: We were extremely cautious when choosing a daycare to send our very needy pup to. We looked for a place where he could have a safe space to socialize and adventure all while being loved by wonderful humans who treat him as their own. At My Dog's House all of our expectations have been exceeded and has become our fur-child's home away from home. Craig and his passionate team go the extra mile to ensure that our little guy is ecstatic to get out of the car for daycare each morning. Highly recommended!

poochy-coo-the-ultimate-doggy-daycare-an.author: Lisa Ting Chong
poochy-coo-the-ultimate-doggy-daycare-an.text: Poochy Coo is by far the ULTIMATE doggy professionals and beyond! A typical day includes playtime, naptime, a mountain/beach walk, old and new friendships. Our fur baby has been under their wing since a young age and has never been more excited, happier, physically and mentally stimulated, loved and cared for. Trusted owners Nikki and Craig take care of "Benny Wenny" as if he's one of their very own. Reassurance every pet owner needs especially when we can't always be around.

posh-pets-mobile-grooming-cape-town.author: Norma Peckham
posh-pets-mobile-grooming-cape-town.text: Used Posh Pets for the first time this week and overall was pretty impressed. There was a bit of hassle setting up the appointment and the communication wasn’t great but when they came they were prepared with everything they needed, even the water!  They were very gentle and patient with my scared dog and did a great job of washing and grooming her and are very good value for money. I will definitely use them again and recommend them for all your pet’s needs.

posh-pets-mobile-grooming-cape-town.author: Lauren Londt
posh-pets-mobile-grooming-cape-town.text: Gave specific instructions on how I wanted my dog groomed. His face was hardly groomed and his paws were unevenly cut. I contacted Denise and asked if she could come back and fix it. She set up an appointment but did not pitch, even though she confirmed hours earlier. She did not even have the decency to cancel or reschedule. Now she is ignoring my calls and messages. Unprofessional & Unreliable.

posh-pets-mobile-grooming-cape-town.author: Fayroez Bhayat
posh-pets-mobile-grooming-cape-town.text: Such an unprofessional company. I made a booking for Friday at 12pm. I contacted the lady at 12:30 to ask if they still coming. She responds that she’s at the wrong address and asked to come the next morning which I agreed to. Saturday morning came and at 8:00am I asked what time I should expect her. She said she has 2 clients then I’ll be next. Up until now, 8:30pm, I have not heard anything from posh pets and no one pitched up all day. I am so disappointed and would not recommend their services. What a waste of my entire Saturday waiting for no one to pitch up and no communication.

posh-pets-mobile-grooming-cape-town.author: Abigail Siljeur
posh-pets-mobile-grooming-cape-town.text: I can't believe this lady! She kept me waiting for 2hrs today! She said she will be available at 13h00...it's 3pm AND SHE HASN'T CALLED!!!! She literally lives two streets aways...please be careful about using this lady...NOT RELIABLE!

posh-pets-mobile-grooming-cape-town.author: Claudine Petersen
posh-pets-mobile-grooming-cape-town.text: It was raining on the day. My dogs were not dried properly. They charged me R550 I asked them if nails were trimmed it was not done. I sent  message next day to please come amd cut around doggies face and her paws were not done. To date no response. They should have rather canceled. I'm hindsight I should have refused ro pay.

ruff-diamonds-dog-grooming-cape-town.author: Natanya Botha
ruff-diamonds-dog-grooming-cape-town.text:
We had an absolutely wonderful experience with our dog groomer, Natalie! She provided exceptional service for our two pugs, Pugsley and Mugzy, and treated them with so much love, patience, and care. From start to finish, she was incredibly friendly and made both dogs feel comfortable and relaxed.
It’s clear she truly cares about animals, and we are very happy with her service. Our pugs looked great and were happy too! We highly recommend her services and will definitely be back.

ruff-diamonds-dog-grooming-cape-town.author: Rachell Govender
ruff-diamonds-dog-grooming-cape-town.text: I have had the most amazing experience with Ruff Diamond dog groomers. Her love for dogs shows in how happy my puppy was after her cut. Thank you for your love and patience and a beautiful cut. 🤗

ruff-diamonds-dog-grooming-cape-town.author: Natascha VJ
ruff-diamonds-dog-grooming-cape-town.text:
After our little rescue Maltese mix had an ear infection, which might have come about due to careless grooming,  we decided to look for someone who might be more into the "one on one" approach, and has true understanding of a dogs nature and needs.
We were happy to get in contact with Natalie from Ruff Diamonds, which turned out to be the person we were looking for.
She takes her time to understand the dog(s) and build rapport, so he/she can get the best treatment to look, but more importantly, also feel good.
Health is a part of beauty, after all.
We do not care for a dog smelling of perfume, it should be treated naturally, organic and with understanding care on top of the list.
We are very pleased with Natalie and the great communication she provided,  and we will definitely return and recommend her.
Our golden oldie Pug (14 yo) will also be happy to get away from the stress of cages and other animals around as happens to be the case at some other groomers.
Thank you Natalie at Ruff Diamonds, we will be back.

ruff-diamonds-dog-grooming-cape-town.author: megan walker
ruff-diamonds-dog-grooming-cape-town.text: Natalie was lovely and did a great job with our long haired dacsi. She was gentle and thorough. Can recommend her services.

ruff-diamonds-dog-grooming-cape-town.author: Ilze King
ruff-diamonds-dog-grooming-cape-town.text: Natalie was fantastic with my very fiesty Yorkie, Buddy! He looked absolutely adorable and so handsome in his bandana ❤️

superwoof-dog-hotel-and-daycare-or-fores.author: Megan Hendricks
superwoof-dog-hotel-and-daycare-or-fores.text:
All the Staff are friendly and always accomodating to us for Kate, especially when we call last minute. She has slight separation anxiety but seems to forget about us once she's upstairs in the doggy day care.
They're quick to respond to any questions I may have and when they send video or pics, my mind is more at ease as I worry about her.

Thank you to ALL THE STAFF who cares for Kate and shows her love and Affection. We really appreciate all that you do.

superwoof-dog-hotel-and-daycare-or-fores.author: Viv Sneddon
superwoof-dog-hotel-and-daycare-or-fores.text: We boarded our little Reggie for 5 nights with Superwoof and what a great experience! We were nervous about leaving our guy for the first time and the team were so kind and answered all our questions quickly and with such care. He definitely had a good time, and was happy and tired out when we fetched him. We loved getting the daily videos and pictures. He even had cupcakes! Thank you for everything guys!!

superwoof-dog-hotel-and-daycare-or-fores.author: Herman
superwoof-dog-hotel-and-daycare-or-fores.text: Bandit doesn't like to be separated from me. He always needs to have sight of me at least. I was therefore concerned about how he'd do at daycare. But I needn't have worried. Superwoof is his safe place, and he LOVES going. His ears perk up as soon as we stop at the front door, and he runs inside without even looking back. He's happy when he arrives, and I swear he leaves smiling from all the fun he had. I highly recommend Superwoof Dog Hotel & Daycare to any pet owner.

superwoof-dog-hotel-and-daycare-or-fores.author: Simone Danielle Potter
superwoof-dog-hotel-and-daycare-or-fores.text:
Both my Border Collies love going to daycare. At first only my younger, more dog-social collie attended, but recently we sent our senior collie too. He is more people-social than dog-social which is why we didn’t send him before, but we were pleasantly surprised to discover how he came out of his shell and played around other dogs while at SUPERWOOF. Both of our babies get very excited when we tell them they’re going to “school” and while waiting in the car for one of the SUPERWOOF team members to collect them, they have their eyes trained on the entrance to the building (that typical border collie stare). When I collect them in the evening they are goofy-happy and once we’re home they crash 😅

Everyone on the SUPERWOOF team is incredible. They are all friendly, helpful and doting on all the doggos. I receive photos and videos of my pups having fun during the day and updates about their grooming etc when required. Booking is so simple and their rates are reasonable. We couldn’t be happier with the amazing service SUPERWOOF provides. Thank you for making our dogs so happy! 😃

superwoof-dog-hotel-and-daycare-or-fores.author: Roxanne Halls
superwoof-dog-hotel-and-daycare-or-fores.text: We absolutely LOVE SuperWoof! We take our beagle Daisy weekly and we also have her stay overnight when we go away. She loves it! Staff are incredible and we couldn't be happier! We have just gotten another Beagle Mugello who is 7 weeks old and we cannot wait until she is 3 months so she can also go to SuperWoof.

the-dog-box-cape-town.author: lauren weaver
the-dog-box-cape-town.text: Loved that the dogs were not in cages but rather moving freely amongst the owner and staff. All the dogs were super relaxed and friendly. My anxious teacup Yorkie was totally fine when put in with the other dogs. When I fetched him, not only was he looking gorgeous with his summer cut, but he was in a good and relaxed mood. Normally he hides away for a day after a parlor, this time, he was happy and proud of his new look. I will be back.

the-dog-box-cape-town.author: hannah kahn
the-dog-box-cape-town.text: I’ve been bringing my dogs to The Dog Box since they were puppies, and I genuinely wouldn’t go anywhere else. Michelle is always incredibly accommodating, and Cindy takes such great care of them. My dogs absolutely love their time here as they get to socialise, play, and have clearly grown very fond of the whole team. It’s such a relief knowing they’re in safe, loving hands. Can’t recommend this place enough!

the-dog-box-cape-town.author: Heidi Malherbe
the-dog-box-cape-town.text: The Soothing dog bed is such a winner! Great value, great price and my pups just love their beds. The 10-month old puppy (who we got just before lockdown) was very scared and skitty. She has calmed down completely and both her and our Pittie fit perfectly in the Large. Great service. Thank you Dog Box SA

the-dog-box-cape-town.author: Abby Lemkus
the-dog-box-cape-town.text: What a wonderful experience at Dog Box! Michelle came highly recommended but their services exceeded all expectation! Helpful, professional and well priced. Innocent, the driver, arrived on time and held my hand with assurance, and our puppy returned better than new. Will definitely be back Xxx

the-dog-box-cape-town.author: Landi Hoffman
the-dog-box-cape-town.text: Excellent cuts and general grooming - The staff is friendly and the dogs can roam freely. The grooming area is open- so you can see how they handle the dogs and its with love and care. Very comfortable to leave my bestie there😊

the-fluffia-pet-grooming-specialists-for.author: U J
the-fluffia-pet-grooming-specialists-for.text: Toska went for a wash and haircut yesterday and he looks absolutely gorgeous. Thank you Fluffia and aunty V for making my boy look so handsome.

the-fluffia-pet-grooming-specialists-for.author: Ulyana Ustinova
the-fluffia-pet-grooming-specialists-for.text: I loved how my toy poodle puppy was taken care of at Fluffia Newlands! Definitely will come back, thank you guys!

the-fluffia-pet-grooming-specialists-for.author: Jenita Ferreira
the-fluffia-pet-grooming-specialists-for.text:
They will treat your dog with the care and attention they deserve at The Fluffia!

I love that their set up has zero cages but rather a cute little picket fence style waiting area. The bathing areas seem to be designed for the comfort of fur babies instead of the groomers.

Location is at a vet so you can stock up on supplies while you wait or visit the shops or restaurants that are on their doorstep.

Snowy can be very anxious but I feel that since going to The Fluffia she is much happier. Grace had her first grooming experience here and she always seems happy to go back.

Highly recommended.

the-fluffia-pet-grooming-specialists-for.author: Jo Ren
the-fluffia-pet-grooming-specialists-for.text: My dog had been here for more than 2 years now, the service was great, my dog had some funny haircut sometimes but that’s alright. The only concern is that my dog is scared to go to the place now, and that had never happened before. I booked him a wash and groom service twice last month, his tail was tucked up, and the urge of wanting to leave the place made me wondered what happened in there.

the-fluffia-pet-grooming-specialists-for.author: Jose Alvarez
the-fluffia-pet-grooming-specialists-for.text: Affordable and  very friendly staff, good communication, can't wait to go again

the-pet-stylist-cape-town.author: Bru Family
the-pet-stylist-cape-town.text: I booked my two dogs for a Pamper session with The Pet Stylist, I am not impressed, so unfriendly and does not seem like a dog lover at all, my dogs came back not properly dried on a cold winters day, and frightened.  I will not use this service again.

the-pet-stylist-cape-town.author: MBE
the-pet-stylist-cape-town.text: My three #Soulfurs love being pampered right at our house by the #petstylist... they are so well organised and take the greatest of care with my fur kids.

the-pet-stylist-cape-town.author: Chantal du Plessis
the-pet-stylist-cape-town.text: Amazing, friendly and efficient service. Our two poodles were groomed very well. We have not have good results from similar services as they can be tricky to shave and cut. Highly recommend if you have dogs that need an expert cut. PS Love the little ribbons they put on their ears.

the-pet-stylist-cape-town.author: Nicolaas Erasmus
the-pet-stylist-cape-town.text: Nope. Not again. Shop around. There’s better in your area.

the-pet-stylist-cape-town.author: Tania Goosen
the-pet-stylist-cape-town.text: Disappointing first experience. The two people who groomed our pet, is definitely not pet lovers. They did not show any affection. The price quoted was different to the price on their website. When I pointed it out to them (WhatsApp screenshot sent to them), they still made me feel like the 'criminal'. Poor client service.

tip-top-dog-and-cat-groomers-cape-town.author: Nina Erhart
tip-top-dog-and-cat-groomers-cape-town.text:
Very Very happy with the service that Tip Top provided. I have a very anxious German Shepard with long and mattered hair. They managed to make her feel comfortable and by the time I fetched her she looked absolutely stunning. The staff are very friendly  you can see that they are animal lovers.

Thank you Tip Top! We will definitely be back.

tip-top-dog-and-cat-groomers-cape-town.author: Bronwyn Fuller
tip-top-dog-and-cat-groomers-cape-town.text: Ally and her team are absolutely amazing! My cat isn't the easiest customer, and she previously became very stressed being groomed. With Tip Top, she came out looking gorgeous and, more importantly, calm and happy. I highly recommend this great company! Their beautiful premises are a perk 🤩

tip-top-dog-and-cat-groomers-cape-town.author: Joseph Stone
tip-top-dog-and-cat-groomers-cape-town.text: The grooming my dog received was good and the staff were friendly. Unfortunately I must share a negative review from getting a surprise when they decided to just add an extra R200 to the bill because my dog had a few extra knots in his coat. He's a dog and that's why he gets booked in and that's what they as dog groomers deal with. If I as the client, were to be notified before hand, it would be a different story. If one is prepared for the event that if a few extra ticks or knots more than usual are found, then please do know that we charge a whole lot more, so the client can know what they are in for, right. General courtesy. So quite frankly, I feel cheated into paying more than what was agreed upon, which makes me never want to go there again and most certainly never want to recommend their services to anyone else.

tip-top-dog-and-cat-groomers-cape-town.author: vanessa bisschop-louw
tip-top-dog-and-cat-groomers-cape-town.text:
I would HIGHLY recommend Tip Top Groomers - Ali and her Team are PHENOMENAL!!

My dogs are always happy going there - they look after them so well!!

We are emigrating to the UK - Ali is looking after my 2 Dogs while we quarantine. The service has been  incredible - nothing is ever too much trouble.

It makes it so much easier knowing they are in safe hands.... until they fly to me.

Ali cares for them as if they are her own pets.

I would DEFINITELY recommend Tip Top Groomers!!!

tip-top-dog-and-cat-groomers-cape-town.author: Tobias Basson
tip-top-dog-and-cat-groomers-cape-town.text: Excellent, Ali and her team is amazing!

tip-top-dog-groomers-gardens-cape-town.author: Patricia Hu
tip-top-dog-groomers-gardens-cape-town.text: I took both my babies today been pekineses and spoiled little devils they are a handful as I picked them up both of their tails where up so happy both look so amazing extremely very happy ❤️thank you so much I would definitely recommend them

tip-top-dog-groomers-gardens-cape-town.author: Liezl Olsen
tip-top-dog-groomers-gardens-cape-town.text:
We have been taking our wire hair terrier to Tip Top Groomers since we’ve had her. Bruce, the owner is lovely and so is all the staff. Professional, helpful and always friendly. Highly recommended.

Thank you for taking such good care of Leika :)

tip-top-dog-groomers-gardens-cape-town.author: Stacey Gordon
tip-top-dog-groomers-gardens-cape-town.text: The best! Such a great experience for my Airedale's first time at the groomers.

tip-top-dog-groomers-gardens-cape-town.author: Claude du Toit
tip-top-dog-groomers-gardens-cape-town.text:
There is no review I can write about Tip Top Dog Groomers which could capture how my experience there made me feel. In one word, I’d probably have to say kingly.

My wife and I have two mini-Schnauzers we adopted. They are wonderful at home but are a handful when we’re out and about. I called to make sure it was okay to bring them through and was told that the team has years of experience dealing with dogs of all shapes, sizes, and temperaments. This put me at ease, but I was still nervous.

Fast forward to grooming time, we left our two little ones there and later got a video of how chilled they were lying there getting groomed and pampered. When we got the WhatsApp to fetch them no longer than 3 hours later, we were surprised!

They looked amazing in comparison to how we left them there, and no one lost fingers.

I cannot recommend Tip Top Dog Groomers enough.

tip-top-dog-groomers-gardens-cape-town.author: Maxine Naiker
tip-top-dog-groomers-gardens-cape-town.text:
Horrible experience.  The owner and workers are not professionals.
Firstly, not all dogs will sit still and my dog is still a puppy. After dropping my dog off, I receive a call from the owner that my dog is giving them a hard time. So I went back to help the staff. Only to realise that they was hurting my dog. He was crying because they was pulling on his fur. They was not gentle at all. Not all dogs sit still and can not expect my puppy to sit still especially when they was pulling on his hair. They do not treat the dogs with love. My dog was trembling and this caused him to vomit on the way back home. I do not recommend these groomers.

tips-and-tails-mobile-dog-groomer-cape-t.author: Duane Milne
tips-and-tails-mobile-dog-groomer-cape-t.text:
Chris has groomed our two mini Schnauzers every month for the last +-5 years. The dogs trust him and he has an extremely deft and gentle hand. Chris listens to what we say, is extremely professional and has a friendly nature.
We trust him with our dogs and he does a very good job. Highly recommend

tips-and-tails-mobile-dog-groomer-cape-t.author: Cammy Smith
tips-and-tails-mobile-dog-groomer-cape-t.text: I’ve been using Tips and Tails for a few years now and wouldn’t go anywhere else. Monique is always so helpful and friendly when it comes to appointments and bookings. My dog is a grumpy old lady who doesn’t really like people… but somehow Chris is the exception she tolerates 😄 With a few well-timed Beeno cookies and a lot of patience, everything always goes smoothly. I’m so grateful for the care, understanding, and love shown to my girl over the years. Highly recommend!

tips-and-tails-mobile-dog-groomer-cape-t.author: Chantal van den Bergh
tips-and-tails-mobile-dog-groomer-cape-t.text: Chris and the whole Tips & Tails family is fantastic!!! We've been grooming our Golden Retriever and Miniature Poodle with them for the past 2 years. From treats to tickles and a bit of playing on the grass; Chris truly cares deeply about our pets and we couldn't be happier. Also very affordable!

tips-and-tails-mobile-dog-groomer-cape-t.author: Jo-Mari Bosman
tips-and-tails-mobile-dog-groomer-cape-t.text: Cosmo loves the calming & loving way he is treated, groomed & taken care of with Tips & Tails. 100% recommended, your dog will thank you!

tips-and-tails-mobile-dog-groomer-cape-t.author: Wilsia Metz
tips-and-tails-mobile-dog-groomer-cape-t.text: Our newest rescue, Amari, loves Chris to bits just like her predecessors. He is gentle and a true dog lover. With Monique’s super efficient running of the appointments at Tips & Tails they really are a dream team.

vierlanden-paws-grooming-parlour-cape-to.author: Anne-Marié Le Roux
vierlanden-paws-grooming-parlour-cape-to.text: Passionate animal lovers and works with so much patience! Highly recommend! I've already made my next appointment for 2 of my other dogs.

vierlanden-paws-grooming-parlour-cape-to.author: Megan
vierlanden-paws-grooming-parlour-cape-to.text: Exceptional service. My goldy fur baby was treated so well.The owner has a sincere passion for the animals and her team treated my boy with so much love and care. The place has a professional set up. I liked how clean and transparent and you can see directly into the grooming area. My fur baby will be back ❤️

vierlanden-paws-grooming-parlour-cape-to.author: G
vierlanden-paws-grooming-parlour-cape-to.text: Best pet parlour in the area. Took my 2 yorkies and they were really well looked after. Will definitely bring them back.

vierlanden-paws-grooming-parlour-cape-to.author: Cheryl McMullin
vierlanden-paws-grooming-parlour-cape-to.text: I would recommend bringing your fur babies here. They are gentle with them and grooming is superb. And my animals are treated with love and care. 🐾❤️

vierlanden-paws-grooming-parlour-cape-to.author: Marcelle Riekert
vierlanden-paws-grooming-parlour-cape-to.text:
Great service and our dogs always love going for their groom at Vierlanden.

Highly recommend.
